author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.19 - Bugfix: firstSeenDate migration was silently failing to persist due to Groovy nested map mutation behavior in Hubitat state storage. Fixed using explicit HashMap copy — Days progress bar will now correctly advance after updating.
